programme.title: Who Gets the Dog?
programme.desc: A couple going through a divorce squabble over custody of their beloved dog.

programme.title: Hope's Legacy
programme.desc: Sometimes hope is all you need, but sometimes it can be hard to find. Faced with the death of her beloved grandmother, Lizzy now focuses on the farm, her horses, and three-day eventing. With her upcoming marriage to James threatened and challenged by a beautiful girl from his past, Lizzy must learn to stand on her own two feet but with Legacy by her side she can do it. It's a competitive world but she's determined to make it work. Lizzy will need to conquer her bullies and overcome three competitions: show jumping, cross country, and dressage with her young horse, Legacy. Her manager is by her side all the way but her past catches up with her, and Lizzy needs to make a choice to stop it all or go for the gold.

programme.title: Hope Ranch (aka Riding Faith)
programme.desc: With the impending foreclose of the family Ranch, Rebecca struggles with her rebellious daughter Grace who is still not over the death of her father Mike.

programme.title: Fire
programme.desc: Sita (Nandita Das) and Radha (Shabana Azmi) are two Indian women stuck in loveless marriages. While Sita is trapped in an arranged relationship with her cruel and unfaithful husband, Jatin (Jaaved Jaafei), Radha is married to his brother, Ashok (Kulbhushan Kharbanda), a religious zealot who believes in suppressing desire. As the two women recognize their similar situations, they grow closer, and t

programme.title: Scents and Sensibility
programme.desc: In this modern adaptation of Jane Austen's Sense and Sensibility, Elinor and Marianne find themselves penniless after their father's fortune is taken away. As they look for ways to pay the bills, they encounter people who judge them and try to keep them down in the dumps. Add falling in love into the mix, and determining whom to trust becomes a mine field. Can the sisters find a balance between relying on their hearts and using good sense without losing everything they hold dear?

programme.title: Mr. Right
programme.desc: Charlotte's taking her chance in the big city. She just began working for the hottest romance site writing their hit weekly dating article, and her new best friend, Lila, is as fun as she is loyal. She also befriends a coffee barista, Liam, who shows her all the best spots in the city. But dating a new guy each week to write about is making her feel burned out. And when Liam develops feelings for her, Charlotte will need to decide whether her work is more important than her chance at love.

programme.title: Love Finds You In Valentine
programme.desc: What can a California girl do with a few dusty acres of land in rural Nebraska? So Kennedy Blaine wonders after she inherits a ranch in the small town of Valentine, Nebraska. As Kennedy makes arrangements to sell the property, she finds herself drawn to the ranch and to its attractive manager, Derek Sterling. She decides to spend the summer in her ancestral home and reconnect with family members. But soon Kennedy is subjected to harassment by someone who clearly wants her to leave Valentine. Depending on God's protection and Derek's assistance, she sets out to discover who is behind the offenses. But when her search reveals painful details about her family and raises questions about Derek's own past, will Kennedy still want to know the truth?

programme.title: A Gift Horse
programme.desc: A grieving, young girl works on the local ranch owned by a business tycoon, when a new horse arrives and she takes the opportunity to regain her faith by training it to win.

programme.title: Man Who Cried for Revenge
programme.desc: Davy Flanagan, a former Union officer who was part of an attempt to break out of a Confederate prison camp during the Civil War and suffered a blow to the head that left him with amnesia. Then a bounty hunter shows up to collect a bounty on his head as a deserter.

programme.title: Shadow of Sartana
programme.desc: Sartana has a bounty on his head and he's wanted dead or alive. To eliminate this he makes a deal with the local politicians. If he hunts down the marauding Randal Brothers, the bounty will be removed.

programme.title: Requiescant
programme.desc: The adopted son of a preacher comes upon a village that is under the thumb of a deranged ex-Confederate officer, who is - among other things - stealing land from the locals with phony land grants.

programme.title: Santa Fe Trail
programme.desc: In 1854, Jeb Stuart, George Custer and other graduates from West Point are posted to Kansas to help pacify the territory before railroad construction to Santa Fe can resume.

programme.title: Love Notes
programme.desc: Starring Laura Leighton and Antonio Cupo. When a classical music critic becomes pregnant from a brief encounter with a country music star, she decides it is the perfect way for her infertile best friend to have a baby.

programme.title: Christmas on Mistletoe Lake
programme.desc: Reilly finds herself in the magical town of Mistletoe Lake. She accepts the offer of Ray to stay in his boat, helping him renovate for the town's Christmas Harbor Festival. Reilly embarks on a journey to save the towns she fell in love with.

programme.title: A Christmas Village
programme.desc: To save her reputation, Piper Jensen, a public relations genius and owner of her own PR company, agrees to work for the owner of a failing Santa's Village and discovers love and how magical Christmas is after all.

programme.title: Miss Me This Christmas
programme.desc: Regina moves into her friend's suite at The Chesterton Hotel as she waits for her divorce settlement to come through on Christmas Day. While there, she starts a whirlwind romance with a billionaire, who proposes to her.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot whose work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: The Chosen
programme.desc: In 1944, in Brooklyn, two Jewish kids become friends. One is from a very conservative family, and the other is more liberal. The issues of importance of tradition, parental expectations and the formation of Israel cause constant friction.

programme.title: Elsa and Fred
programme.desc: Two of Hollywood's most dazzling stars light up the screen in this captivating story on finding true love. After his daughter (Marcia Gay Harden) persuades widower Fred to move into a new apartment, he strikes up a friendship with his eccentric neighbour Elsa, who convinces him it's never too late to find love. Starring Oscar winners Shirley MacLaine (Downton Abbey) and Christopher Plummer (Up).

programme.title: Pele: Birth of a Legend
programme.desc: The amazing story of Pele's meteoric rise from the slums of Sao Paulo to World Cup victory.

programme.title: Day Zero
programme.desc: Day Zero follows the lives of three best friends in New York City who have thirty days to come to terms with their fate, being drafted into the military. Rifkin (CHRIS KLEIN) is a married lawyer whose career is on the rise. Feller (ELIJAH WOOD) is working on his second novel. The first was a smash success, but he's having a writer's block. Dixon (JON BERNTHAL) drives a cab and lives a solitary life. Over thirty days, they will find their relationships tested as they confront long held beliefs about life, death, courage and love.

programme.title: Santa Fe Marshal
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Hopalong Cassidy is called when a town becomes overrun with bad guys. Disguised as a member of a medicine show, Hoppy discovers that the ringleader is none other than sweet li'l ol' Ma Burton.

programme.title: La Tierra Llamando A Ana
programme.desc: The story of a love, of a home, the story of Ana and Juan. The film also Features an amazing original composition written by the director.

programme.title: Roaring Abyss
programme.desc: A sound journey accros the mountains, deserts and forests of Ethiopia and its cultural universe. Roaring Abyss will take you through an inedit collection of music recordings of unvaluable importance for the transmission and preservation of the African heritage.

programme.title: Dreamcatcher
programme.desc: Julia, victim to multiple psychological disorders, must survive the night without her prescribed sedatives. In and out of sleep the only thing protecting her sanity is the Dreamcatcher.

programme.title: Iron Island
programme.desc: Some poor people in the Southern coasts of Iran do not have any place to live, and thus, they reside on an old, abandoned ship in the sea. Captain Nemat, their chief, tries to persuade the ship-owner and the official authorities not to get the ship back. On the other hand, he is selling the iron parts of the ship piece by piece. “Iron Island” is the story of those whose ignorance makes them simply trust those who are always ready to abuse their trust.

programme.title: Turning Green
programme.desc: Set in late 1970s Ireland, it tells the story of 16-year-old James Powers, an American who finds himself lost after his mother dies and he is forced to live with his three Irish aunts. Displaced and depressed, he longs for a way to make it back to America. One lucky weekend in London, James discovers pornography and, desperate for cash, he decides to sell them back in Ireland. His success spreads wildly. After finding a possible way home, he must decide where home really is, and finds that one's place in the world is all a state of mind.

programme.title: For The Love Of Benji
programme.desc: Benji is back! En route to a vacation in Greece Benji becomes separated from the family in Athens, Benji finds himself on the run from an assortment of international spies seeking an energy scientist, who has been working on a secret formula.

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: A comedy centered on three museum security guards who devise a plan to steal back the artworks to which they have become attached after they are transferred to another museum. Starring: Morgan Freeman, Christopher Walken, Joseph McKenna, Wynn Everett

programme.title: Foster
programme.desc: A heart-warming story of family and friendship starring Academy Award Nominee Toni Collette and Ioan Gruffudd.

programme.title: A Boy Called Sailboat
programme.desc: A small family finds hope in their extraordinary son named Sailboat when a personal gesture awakens a global desire.

programme.title: Knucklehead
programme.desc: After incurring a large debt with a local criminal ringleader, Eddie Sullivan creates a get-rich-quick scheme and enlists a gentle giant named Walter as his unwitting accomplice.

programme.title: Max Winslow and the House of Secrets
programme.desc: Five teens are invited to the home of an eccentric billionaire to compete in a game to win his mansion. The night takes a dark turn when they become trapped in the house and are forced to face off against each other and an evil AI entity who controls everything in the house including their fate. This film contains a sequence of flashing lights which might affect customers who are susceptible to photosensitive epilepsy.

programme.title: Dark Star
programme.desc: John Carpenter's pulp science fiction classic - this brilliantly clever and funny parody of Stanley Kubrick's 2001: A Space Odyssey, follows a warped intergalactic mission to blow up unstable planets. Four bored astronauts fill in time between missions catching up on their tans with the help of a sun-lamp, playing with a suspiciously plastic-looking alien mascot they are taking back to Earth and conversing with their female version of Hal. Things start to go horribly wrong when the spaceship computer misfires and a 'smart bomb' thinks it is God.

programme.title: Tangent Room
programme.desc: Trapped in a mysterious room with no escape, four brilliant minds race against time to prevent a cosmic collapse of the universe. They must learn to work together and solve the puzzle before it's too late.

programme.title: Sum of Histories
programme.desc: Two physicists discover how to manipulate electrons with quantum tunneling to send emails to the past. With the power to influence the recent past, the temptation to right old wrongs is too great.

programme.title: Exceptional Beings
programme.desc: Two supernatural beings question their divine status when they meet an ordinary woman with a disturbing essence: a human being who does not correspond to what their millennia of knowledge of humanity has taught them.

programme.title: Once Upon a Date
programme.desc: When top-notched real estate broker, Josh Donahue, is sent to buyout a community playhouse he unexpectedly falls for the owner forcing him to decide between the family business and true love.

programme.title: Inconceivable
programme.desc: A woman interprets a kiss at a high school reunion as an invitation to follow her ex across the country and supplant his current family.

programme.title: The Past Never Dies
programme.desc: CASEY MARSH was born in captivity. Her mother, JANE, was abducted as a teenager and gave birth to Casey while she was being held by the kidnapper, TIMOTHY FAST. Jane eventually escaped when Casey was 6 years old. Timothy Fast was arrested and incarcerated. Ever since, Jane has struggled to regain a normal life for her and her daughter. For Casey, the memories of a childhood in captivity still haunt her. Jane, on the other hand, has seemingly moved on. She has re-married and is happy. When a number of local women start to go missing, Jane reveals to Casey that Timothy might have had an accomplice and wonders if he is involved. The kidnapping M.O. is eerily similar. Casey is furious that her mother has hidden this knowledge from her all this time. Then, Jane suddenly disappears. Has she been kidnapped again? Casey must face the demons of her past in order to find her mother before it's too late.

programme.title: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: Young divorce lawyer Kelsey finds it safer to keep love out of her life - that is until a stray dog pairs her with Harrison, the local vet.

programme.title: Late Bloomer
programme.desc: A woman falls for a guy who bullied her in high school.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: Despite the Falling Snow
programme.desc: In 1950s Moscow, communist Katya secretly spies for the Americans in the Cold War arms race. When she lands her biggest assignment, stealing secrets from rising government star Alexander, the last thing she expects is to fall in love with him.

programme.title: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Jessica Tucker, a widow and successful doctor, is trying to juggle work and family when she learns she's up for the top job at the hospital.

programme.title: Just for the Summer
programme.desc: Teacher Penelope Campbell loves visiting her Grandma Dot every summer – despite her constant attempts to find Penelope a man! This year, she bumps into her childhood sweetheart Jason Humphrey, who explains his grandmother is desperate to pair him off, too.

programme.title: Summerland
programme.desc: During World War II, an Englishwoman opens her heart to an evacuee after initially resolving to be rid of him.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: A young Marine corporal's unique bond with her combat dog saves many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: The Aviator
programme.desc: A biopic depicting the early years of aviator Howard Hughes' career from the late 1920s to the mid 1940s.

programme.title: Tomorrow Morning
programme.desc: Tomorrow Morning is the story of one couple seen in two separate timelines, a decade apart. This is a story of life, love, misunderstanding and hope... a universal and timeless tale.

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: For the Love of Benji
programme.desc: Benji is on holiday with his family in Greece, but after getting separated at the airport, he finds himself on another exciting adventure, now on the run from international spies!

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: Battle for Skyark
programme.desc: Witness the greatest battle for peace, justice and mankind in this fantasy thriller. The earth has been taken over by vicious monsters, and humans have taken refuge in the sky in the city, Skyark. When Skyark starts overcrowding the rich and powerful mercilessly dump the poor and the orphans back to the desolate earth. Among them a boy who is determined to make things right.

programme.title: That's Not Me
programme.desc: Introducing a heart-warming, fun-filled journey of self-discovery. Polly's dream of making it big as an actress are completely ruined, by none other than her identical twin who has landed a big role and risen to stardom. Now with everyone mistaking her for her famous celebrity sister, Polly decides to use this to her advantage…This reckless comedy completely steals the limelight.

programme.title: Robin Hood: The Rebellion
programme.desc: The Raid meets Die Hard with a medieval twist, in this fast and furious new take on the legend of Robin Hood featuring the stars of Game of Thrones, Vikings and Torchwood. When Maid Marian is kidnapped by the Sheriff of Nottingham, Robin Hood must get a band of men together to save her. An audacious plan is set to penetrate the depths of the Sheriff's castle to defeat the bloodthirsty tyrant.

programme.title: Burning Rubber
programme.desc: John Travolta stars in this action-packed, testosterone-fuelled thriller! When his son joins a rival racing team, a retired car racing legend returns to the dirt track, sparking more tension and brutal competition between the father and son duo. Co-stars Hollywood veteran Michael Madsen and global sensation Shania Twain. Sparks are set to fly in this gripping tale rooted in high-speed danger!

programme.title: A Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: Newlyweds Cynthia and Steve host their first family Christmas. But a mixture of timing and a series of unfortunate incidents threatens to derail their attempts at hosting the perfect Christmas. (2016)

programme.title: Christmas Manger
programme.desc: A modern Christmas fable about a rough-around-the-edges rancher who is reunited with his daughter.

programme.title: Christmas Collision
programme.desc: Theodora and Charlie are at odds with each other when she is sent to repossess his family farm. But will their feelings towards each other alter when they are forced to spend time together? (2021)

programme.title: Looks Like Christmas
programme.desc: Two single parents battle it out for control of the annual Christmas Spectacular.

programme.title: Click and Collect
programme.desc: Two neighbours must drive across the country to pick up the one toy that will make a little girl's Christmas dreams come true. Starring Stephen Merchant and Asim Chaudhry (2018)

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: Romance Novelist Jo must work with Navy Seal officer Colin on her next book. Will Colin put Jo through the wringer, or will cupids bow bring this unlikely pair together in harmony? (2017)

programme.title: Love by Chance
programme.desc: Claire, a pastry chef, is busy running her new restaurant, but her meddling mother is preoccupied with her lack of love life. Without her knowledge, Claire's mother finds her the perfect man. (2016)

programme.title: Love's Sweet Recipe
programme.desc: Courtney is a talented chef who has taken over the running of the family restaurant. But is her renewed zest for life and her newfound passion for cooking linked to Jake returning home? (2021)

programme.title: A Feeling of Home
programme.desc: Abby attempts to disguise her roots and convince a backer she's from New England. But her task is complicated by a trip home and an unexpected reunion with her ex-boyfriend. Stars Jonna Walsh (2019)

programme.title: Sealed With A Kiss
programme.desc: A country music star returns to his hometown ahead of his high-profile wedding. But will a chance meeting see him question the meaning of true love? Jesse Metcalfe and Autumn Reeser star. (2015)

programme.title: House in Nightmare Park
programme.desc: Foster Twelve trees, who gives hammy readings from the classics, cannot believe his luck when Stewart Henderson and his sister offer him a fee to give a reading at their eerie stately mansion.

programme.title: THE UNCANNY
programme.desc: Peter Cushing stars as Wilbur Gray, an eccentric author.

programme.title: Act of Murder
programme.desc: An actor attempts to win back his former mistress by putting stress on her husband - poisoning the family dog, farm animals at their country place, simulating a robbery attempt

programme.title: THE ARSENAL STADIUM MYSTERY
programme.desc: Classic crime drama. During a charity match between Arsenal and the Trojans, the Trojans' striker mysteriously collapses in full view of the capacity crowd. When it is discovered that he has been poisoned, Scotland Yard is called in to investigate.

programme.title: CHECKPOINT
programme.desc: A gunshot rings out in an Italian motor factory, the watchman lies dead and the safe door is open. As the police arrive, a figure disappears into the shadows and fires at a mercury cylinder. Who is responsible and what do they want?

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Deep inside the most secure bank in America, three desperate women from very different worlds cook up the most unlikely heist of the century.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: In the future, a man with access to people's memories finds his life at risk when he discovers a dark secret.

programme.title: Memoirs of a Geisha
programme.desc: A visually stunning adaptation of Arthur Golden's best-selling novel. The director of Chicago, Rob Marshall, transports us into a mysterious and exotic world that casts a potent spell. A Cinderella story like no other, MEMOIRS OF A GEISHA stars Ziyi Zhang, Ken Watanabe, Michelle Yeoh and Gong Li.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The "Angels", three investigative agents (Barrymore, Diaz and Liu) who work for the Charles Townsend Detective Agency, return for another high-octane series of adventures as they investigate the theft of a database of witness protection profiles, after five of the people on the list are murdered. They're aided by a new Bosley (Bernie Mac), in an adventure which pits them against a "fallen angel" (Moore), their old nemesis, the Thin Man (Glover), and others.

programme.title: Sheena
programme.desc: Exotic Tanya Roberts stars as Sheena, a comic book legend that comes to life. As a child, she was lost in the African jungle and adopted by the Zambouli tribe. She rules over the untamed wilds of Africa, until outsiders challenge her domain in this fun-filled action-adventure.

programme.title: Armored
programme.desc: A young armored car guard is persuaded by his veteran cohorts to empty the truck of its $10 Million.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: They're beautiful, they're brilliant and they work for Charlie.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A romantically challenged morning show producer's search for Mr. Perfect has left her hopelessly single. She's in for a rude awakening when her bosses team her with Mike Chadway, a hardcore TV personality who promises to spill the ugly truth on what makes men and women tick.

programme.title: Dick
programme.desc: Two clueless teenagers unwittingly get involved in the Watergate scandal that brought down the Nixon administration.

programme.title: Man Of The House (2005)
programme.desc: A hard-edged Texas Ranger is forced to go undercover as an assistant cheerleading coach to protect a group of college cheerleaders after they witness a murder.

programme.title: Fools Rush In (1997)
programme.desc: Worlds collide when pragmatic New Yorker and fiery Latina impulsively marry.

programme.title: Sommersby
programme.desc: A man presumed dead shows up after six years, but he may be an imposter, and could choose to hang for murder rather than reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Way Back
programme.desc: The Way Back is the critically acclaimed new release from renowned director Peter Weir (Master and Commander, The Truman Show), starring Colin Farrell, Jim Sturgess, Ed Harris, Mark Strong and Saoirse Ronan.

programme.title: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble
programme.desc: Loving parents Johnny and Mickey Lubitch learn that their son, Tod, is born with an immune deficiency. Forced to live in a self-contained environment, he is unable to have direct contact with anything or anyone in the outside world.

programme.title: La Vie En Rose
programme.desc: Raised in poverty, Edith's magical voice and her passionate romances and friendships with the greatest names of the period – Yves Montand, Jean Cocteau, Charles Aznavour, Marlene Dietrich, Marcel Cerdan and others – made her a star all around the world.

programme.title: Burying Yasmeen
programme.desc: One man's odyssey to put a ring on his dead ex-wife.

programme.title: Rise of the Jurassic
programme.desc: A young scientist and her team arrive at a mysterious island, looking for answers as to what happened to her father who disappeared there years ago. What they find is beyond what any of them expected.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: France is in turmoil and a new, naive King finds himself manipulated by the evil Cardinal Richelieu (James Cosmo, Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan).

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: There Be Dragons
programme.desc: Two childhood friends become separated by the political turmoil of pre-war Spain only to find themselves on opposite sides when the war erupts. One becomes a priest, the other is an activist who becomes a spy for the fascist movement. As the battles are waged, the characters' lives collide...

programme.title: Untangled S1 E34
programme.desc: Diya, a gully badminton player, meets Arjun, a former badminton champ from an affluent family, who resents his own kin. Will Diya bring back the much-needed positivity and hope in Arujns life?

programme.title: Mehek S1 E34
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Dholi Beats S1 E34
programme.desc: The story revolves around Geet, a young woman who follows her father's footsteps as a dhol player, challenging societal norms about gender roles in music. Her journey is supported by her husband, Malhar, who helps her pursue her dreams.

programme.title: King of Hearts S1 E34
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances S1 E34
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar S1 E34
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate S1 E34
programme.desc: Arjun spends time with Preeta and the Aroras. When he returns home, Anjali overhears him confessing his feelings for Preeta alone in the car.

programme.title: Trinayani S1 E34
programme.desc: Trinayani is a woman who can see the future. She decides to use her power to make other peoples lives better. How will things turn out for her when people learn about her extraordinary abilities?

programme.title: The Good Son S1 E34
programme.desc: Raja Beta is an Indian television drama series that revolves around the life of Vedant Tripathi, an ideal and dutiful son. Vedant is adopted by the Tripathi family and grows up to become a successful gynecologist. Despite facing challenges and prejudice due to his adopted status, he wins the love and respect of his family through his unwavering dedication, kindness, and sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Undercover Love S1 E34
programme.desc: Behind the facade of running an NGO for hearing and speech impaired children, the demure Jagadhatri Sanyal is, in reality, a fiery intelligence officer code-named JAS.

programme.title: Untangled S1 E34

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Rhino horn is very expensive in the illegal market and the poachers know it. Kaziranga has the only concentrated population of the one horned Rhino in the world. And poachers are attracted to Kaziranga like ants are to sugar.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Elephant human conflict has been going on in India for decades. Only now it has increased because of the shrinking forests and the expanding human habitation. North Bengal with it's fragmented habitat of tea gardens, human habitation and paddy fields is a hot bed of conflict

programme.title: Ocean's Africa
programme.desc: In A 'Tale Of Two Sharks' we take a look at the incredible array of sharks found off the South African coast, focusing on the endangered Scalloped Hammerhead and the iconic Great White.

programme.title: Nature's Cutest
programme.desc: As we all know the natural world can be tough and challenging at times, but it can also be nothing short of adorable.

programme.title: Planet California: Close Encounters
programme.desc: From the majesty of blue whales and the menace of great white sharks to the curious habits of the kangaroo rat and playful kit foxes, rare and spectacular footage brings California's wildlife into sharp focus. Cataclysmic events like earthquakes and El Nino's storms rock and shape the land, yet some species - like Methuselah, one of the oldest organisms in the world - persist, constantly adapting to a rapidly changing world. Still, in a space shared with 40 million people, is there room for all? The pressure heats up in dramatic and challenging habitats. Move over Hollywood. Planet California's wildlife stars are ready for their close-up.

programme.title: Coasts
programme.desc: The crocodile is king of the wetland a tone of cold blooded monster with the most terrifying bite force on Earth. The product of a 100 million year ancestry, the 25 species around today are testament to the crocodile's supreme intelligence and adaptability.

programme.title: Lions On The Move
programme.desc: Kevin Richardson shares an extraordinary bond with Africa's most fearsome predators. Together with them, he has experienced some real adventures. However, transporting 27 lions and 14 hyenas to a new home presents a different challenge.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Rhino horn is very expensive in the illegal market and the poachers know it. Kaziranga has the only concentrated population of the one horned Rhino in the world. And poachers are attracted to Kaziranga like ants are to sugar.

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Photographer Matthias Ziegler is an Africa specialist. He has visited nearly every country on the continent on assignments for international agencies. Zanzibar, however, is new territory for him. He's come to the former slave island for a photo book – and this time he's not alone. To see the Tanzanian archipelago from the air, he has enlisted the services of ultralight pilot Richard Meredith-Hardy of England to fly him around in his FIB, or flying inflatable boat. Perfect conditions for an adventurous journey: as a world champion ultralight pilot, Richard and his FIB can take off and land practically anywhere – in theory.

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Renaud Van Der Meeren is a photographer and paramotor pilot. With his motorised parachute he goes on expeditions to the remotest corners on earth to photograph people and landscapes from the air. Renaud wanted to be a jet pilot, studied music at the Sorbonne, became a ski instructor, model and photographer's assistant before he found happiness in his current vocation. He especially likes to do his job in Mauritius – nowhere else does he find so many motifs as on the "sweetest pearl in the Indian Ocean". This time he's working on a photo book about Mauritius – by land, by water and in the air.

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Spirits, Kings, Lemurs – Madagascar treats Ami to a multitude of new impressions and spectacular pictures. Director Christian Schidlowski and his team accompanied her on her trip.

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Along with photographer Rui Camilo, we travel to the West African island nation of Sao Tomé and Príncipe - in search of images that will capture the soul of this small and beautiful country.

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Cape Verde – the islands of Saudade, of longing. For Stéphane and Richard it was a journey full of adventure, unforgettable encounters and magnificent photographs. Director Christian Schidlowski and his team accompanied them on their trip.

programme.title: Stories of the Mediterranean Forest: Sierra Morena
programme.desc: The Mediterranean Basin is one of the planet's most biologically rich and complex regions. The crossroads of Europe, Asia and Africa is considered to be one of Earth's biodiversity hotspots. A vast number of both animal and plant species unique to the region live in its various habitats. The Mediterranean Basin is located in one of the planet's temperate zones. The subtropical climate makes it colder and wet here in winter, hot and dry in summer and mild and rainy in autumn and spring.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the 2023 Strongman Champions League in Vaasa, Finland! This year's event introduces a knockout format with 6 intense events over 90 minutes, ending in a unique deadlift face-off with boats.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 2
programme.desc: Stage 2 of the Strongman Champions League 2023 is set in Zrenjanin, Serbia. This exciting event features 5 challenging contests, including a superhuman Yoke race. As the SCL World Series Tour continues, athletes will battle it out to claim the yellow leader's position for the season. Don't miss this incredible stage of strength and endurance!

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3
programme.desc: The World's Strongest Team will be crowned in this edition of SCL, here in Kalajoki-Finland we've picked some of the best in the business, teamed them up, and they'll be going all out against each other. It's now no longer about being a lonely wolf, but more about the pack mentality. It is a competition over 7 events, including a Big 2-man Log lift and heavy deadlift. Let's start the action.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 4
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it's the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 5
programme.desc: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it's about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the World's Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 8
programme.desc: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn't compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts it's the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League.
